info.description: Moolah Household Finance & Investment SaaS API.
info.title: Moolah Financial API

get.description: Returns all accounts belonging to the current tenant.

post.description: Creates a new financial account for the current tenant.

get.description: Returns details of a specific account by ID.

delete.description: Soft-deletes an account and its transactions.

patch.description: Updates details of an existing account.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of system audit logs. Requires sysadmin role.
Returns a list of all tenants in the system. Requires sysadmin role.
Returns details of any tenant by ID. Requires sysadmin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a tenant and all its data. Requires sysadmin role and matching X-Confirm-Token header.

patch.description: Changes the subscription plan of a tenant. Requires sysadmin role.

post.description: Restores a suspended or soft-deleted tenant. Requires sysadmin role.
Suspends a tenant's access to the system. Requires sysadmin role.

get.description: Returns a list of all users in the system across all tenants. Requires sysadmin role.
Returns details of any user by ID. Requires sysadmin role.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user from the system. Requires sysadmin role.

post.description: Validates email and generates a 6-digit verification code sent via email.
Validates the 6-digit code and returns a PASETO token pair.
Uses a valid refresh token to obtain a new access token.

get.description: Returns all categories for the current tenant. Can be filtered by type or parent ID.

post.description: Creates a new category for the current tenant.

get.description: Returns details of a specific category by ID.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a category. This may be blocked if there are transactions associated with it.

patch.description: Updates details of an existing category.

get.description: Returns the details of the tenant (household) associated with the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the details of the current tenant (e.g., household name).

post.description: Invites a new user (family member) to the current tenant.

get.description: Returns a list of transactions for the current tenant. Can be filtered by account, category, type, and date range.

post.description: Creates a new financial transaction (income, expense, or transfer).

get.description: Returns details of a specific transaction by ID.

patch.description: Updates details of an existing transaction.

amount_cents.description: Always in cents; positive value; type determines direction

master_purchase_id.description: Empty for regular transactions; set in Phase 2

access_token.description: AccessToken is the PASETO access token.

expires_at.description: ExpiresAt is the timestamp when the access token expires.

refresh_token.description: RefreshToken is the PASETO refresh token.
